introTitle: Elegance in every bite, quality in every detail.
introText: Baklavateur combines traditional recipes with modern touches. Our flavors, prepared with the finest ingredients by master hands, are now in Geneva.
testimonialQuote: Baklavateur allowed us to find the real taste of baklava in Geneva. Quality, freshness and elegance combined.

intro: Gourmet creations designed for Geneva, prepared with care and presented with elegance.
productsIntro: Discover our baklava, Turkish delight, nuts and gift boxes, with prices exclusively in CHF.
aboutIntro: Discover a Geneva gourmet house bringing together baklava craftsmanship and contemporary presentation.
contactIntro: A question, an order or a special request? Message us directly on WhatsApp.
contactText: We help you choose the right products, sizes and gift boxes for your occasion.

story.text: Baklavateur combines traditional craftsmanship, carefully selected ingredients and a presentation created for Geneva. Every detail reflects freshness, generosity and elegance.

benefitTexts.3: A local service designed for Geneva.

gift.title: Gift boxes made for memorable occasions
gift.text: For birthdays, visits, celebrations or simply to make someone happy.

items.q: How do I place an order?
items.a: Choose a product and use the WhatsApp button. A prepared message opens automatically.
Geneva is our priority market, with shipping available across Switzerland.
All prices are displayed exclusively in Swiss francs (CHF).

productDetail.priceNote: Price shown for the first size. The final amount is confirmed via WhatsApp.
productDetail.deliveryText: Availability, delivery time and delivery method are confirmed directly with you on WhatsApp.

aboutTitle: Traditional flavour, thoughtfully presented for Geneva
aboutText: Baklavateur selects baklava, Turkish delight, nuts and gift boxes with one clear aim: to offer an elegant, straightforward and generous experience for moments of sharing in Geneva and across Switzerland.
aboutText2: Baklavateur, geleneksel tarifleri modern dokunuşlarla buluşturur. En kaliteli malzemelerle, usta ellerde hazırlanan tatlarımız şimdi Cenevre'de.
